description: Dual-graph MCP tool for Claude Code and Codex CLI
notes:
Run in this terminal after install:
  dgc "C:\path\to\your\project"                  # Claude Code
  dg  "C:\path\to\your\project"                  # Codex CLI
  graperoot "C:\path\to\your\project" --cursor    # Cursor IDE
  graperoot "C:\path\to\your\project" --gemini    # Gemini CLI
  graperoot "C:\path\to\your\project" --opencode  # OpenCode
  graperoot "C:\path\to\your\project" --copilot   # GitHub Copilot (VS Code)
